scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @qizhi/skill-spec && npm run build --workspace @qizhi/skill-market-server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @qizhi/skill-spec && npm run test --workspace @qizhi/skill-market-server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @qizhi/skill-spec && npm run typecheck --workspace @qizhi/skill-spec && npm run typecheck --workspace @qizhi/skill-market-server
